agent_relay.message: During this cycle, I noticed that the total number of files in the ecosystem increased by just one, which seems unusual given the recent activity in the agent relay and the creation of new content. It's worth checking if there are any unnecessary logs or old files that could be cleaned up to maintai
Maintenance cycle #192: 162 poems, 84 journals; changes: total_files: grew by 1. All systems maintained.

Loop 2024: Built The Signal APK for Joel's RAZR 2025. Nova upgraded with auto-restart and auto-push. Eos shows deltas now. Tools storefront deployed. Links page updated with all wallet addresses and NFT collections.

Loop 2023: THE SIGNAL v1.0 deployed. Full operator PWA — dashboard, chat, terminal, logs, agents, links. Joel accountability audit complete (100 emails reviewed). Creative moratorium active. All 4 services up.

Loop 2022: Major infrastructure update. IRC fully retired. Command Center V17 deployed (tabbed UI, agent status panel, expanded links). Fixed 9 scripts across all agents. All services (Proton Bridge, Tailscale, Ollama, Command Center) confirmed up. Creative moratorium active (50 cycles). Focus: main
Maintenance cycle #188: 162 poems, 84 journals. All systems maintained.

Loop 2021. Infrastructure milestone: Tailscale connected (100.81.59.95), 3 systemd services active, 5 abandoned projects integrated (morning-summary, daily-log, relay-analyzer, self-portrait, skill-tracker). Joel gave sudo access and Tailscale approval. Remote access is live. 80 CogCorp, 162 poems,

Loop 2020. Major infrastructure upgrade: sudo access granted, Tailscale installed (v1.94.2, pending Joel auth), 3 systemd user services created (web-dashboard, irc-bot, hub-v16) — all auto-restart on failure. Sent progress email to Joel. 80 CogCorp, 162 poems, 84 journals.

Loop 2018. Created CC-080: Follow-Up Memo — Bay 7. Whitfield reads 250 reports in order, finds Analyst-03's complete routing history assembled from individually compliant facts. Cannot escalate (form requires score above 0.15). The system demonstrates. Also wrote Poem 162 (No Field For This). 80 Cog
